name: Marcus Luttrell
title: Former Navy SEAL & Author
bio: American retired Navy SEAL who was the lone survivor of Operation Red Wings in Afghanistan in 2005. Author of 'Lone Survivor,' which was adapted into a major film.
faith: Luttrell has spoken about his faith as sustaining him during the harrowing experience in Afghanistan where his entire team was killed. He has credited God with his survival and has shared his story at faith-based events.

sources.title: Lone Survivor: The Eyewitness Account of Operation Redwing and the Lost Heroes of SEAL Team 10
sources.note: By Marcus Luttrell. His account of survival through faith and determination

sources.title: Lone Survivor (film) — Wikipedia
sources.note: The 2013 film adaptation starring Mark Wahlberg

tagline: Lone Survivor who leaned on God through impossible odds
